stevenson.degree: B.S. Interdisciplinary Studies (CIS/Applied Mathematics), Mathematical Modeling and Information Retrieval
stevenson.activities: Activities and societies: Tutor, International mathematical modeling competitions (successful participant and honorable mention), and approved extended undergrad research on search algorithms and information retrieval. Greenspring Valley Orchestra Tenor Soloist
stevenson.program: Followed a traditional engineering and applied mathematics curriculum towards business applications with core programming courses, topics in advanced mathematics, and an extended joint Mathematics & CIS adjudicated thesis project.

shazy.degree: Traditional Training in the Melocchi Method and Coaching in Tenor Works in The Grand Repertoire, Voice and Opera
shazy.description: 15+ years of vocal training in the method of Melocchi with coaching in the tenor repertoire focused on lyric and spinto roles. Focused on Verdi, Bellini, Donizetti, Puccini, and Mozart operas.

umbc.activities: Activities and societies: Professional level training in Enterprise Java Development in a Mainframe environment.

cert.bls: Basic Life Support for Healthcare and Public Safety (BLS)
